ddls:
CREATE TABLE "genomic_sequences" (
  "sequence_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each genomic sequence */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the genomic sequence */,
  "max_score" REAL /* Maximum score of the sequence alignment */,
  "total_score" REAL /* Total score of the sequence alignment */,
  "query_cover" TEXT /* Query coverage of the sequence alignment */,
  "e_value" REAL /* E-value of the sequence alignment */,
  "identity" TEXT /* Identity percentage of the sequence alignment */,
  "accession" TEXT /* Accession number of the sequence */,
  "virus_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the virus the sequence belongs to */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the sequence was uploaded */,
  "uploaded_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who uploaded the sequence */,
  "strain_id" INTEGER /* ID of the strain of the virus */,
  "isolate_id" INTEGER /* ID of the isolate of the virus */,
  "sequence_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sequence type */,
  "public_access" INTEGER /* Indicates if the sequence is publicly accessible */,
  "last_modified" TEXT /* Date the sequence was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sequence_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_genomic_sequences_uploaded_by FOREIGN KEY ("uploaded_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_genomic_sequences_virus_id FOREIGN KEY ("virus_id") REFERENCES viruses ("virus_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_genomic_sequences_sequence_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("sequence_type_id") REFERENCES sequence_types ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "viruses" (
  "virus_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each virus */,
  "virus_name" TEXT /* Name of the virus */,
  "virus_type" TEXT /* Type of the virus */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the virus */,
  "genus" TEXT /* Genus of the virus */,
  "family" TEXT /* Family of the virus */,
  "host_species" TEXT /* Host species of the virus */,
  "geographical_distribution" TEXT /* Geographical distribution of the virus */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("virus_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sequence_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sequence type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the sequence type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the sequence type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sequence_annotation" (
  "annotation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each annotation */,
  "sequence_id" INTEGER /* ID of the genomic sequence the annotation belongs to */,
  "gene_name" TEXT /* Name of the gene */,
  "protein_name" TEXT /* Name of the protein */,
  "cds_start" INTEGER /* Start position of the coding sequence */,
  "cds_end" INTEGER /* End position of the coding sequence */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the annotation */,
  "annotation_type" TEXT /* Type of the annotation (e.g., gene, protein) */,
  "annotation_source" TEXT /* Source of the annotation data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("annotation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sequence_annotation_sequence_id FOREIGN KEY ("sequence_id") REFERENCES genomic_sequences ("sequence_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Institution the user is affiliated with */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department within the institution */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* User's permissions */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "sequence_id" INTEGER /* ID of the genomic sequence being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the sequence */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the sequence was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent (e.g., browser, operating system) used for access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_sequence_id FOREIGN KEY ("sequence_id") REFERENCES genomic_sequences ("sequence_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sequence_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "sequence_id" INTEGER /* ID of the genomic sequence the version belongs to */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the sequence */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date the version was created */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Description of the changes in the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sequence_versions_sequence_id FOREIGN KEY ("sequence_id") REFERENCES genomic_sequences ("sequence_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sequence_files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each file */,
  "sequence_id" INTEGER /* ID of the genomic sequence the file belongs to */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* Type of the file (e.g., fasta, gbk) */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the sequence file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "file_format" TEXT /* Format of the file (e.g., fasta, gbk) */,
  "file_checksum" TEXT /* Checksum of the file to ensure data integrity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sequence_files_sequence_id FOREIGN KEY ("sequence_id") REFERENCES genomic_sequences ("sequence_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sequence_metadata" (
  "metadata_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metadata record */,
  "sequence_id" INTEGER /* ID of the genomic sequence the metadata belongs to */,
  "collection_site" TEXT /* Location where the sequence was collected */,
  "collection_method" TEXT /* Method used to collect the sequence */,
  "collection_date" TEXT /* Date the sequence was collected */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the collection */,
  "sequencing_depth" INTEGER /* Sequencing depth */,
  "sequencing_platform" TEXT /* Platform used for sequencing */,
  "library_preparation_method" TEXT /* Method used for library preparation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metadata_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sequence_metadata_sequence_id FOREIGN KEY ("sequence_id") REFERENCES genomic_sequences ("sequence_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sequence_comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "sequence_id" INTEGER /* ID of the genomic sequence the comment belongs to */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the comment */,
  "comment_date" TEXT /* Date the comment was made */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "comment_status" TEXT /* Status of the comment (e.g., approved, pending, rejected) */,
  "parent_comment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent comment (for nested comments) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sequence_comments_sequence_id FOREIGN KEY ("sequence_id") REFERENCES genomic_sequences ("sequence_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sequence_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
